steps.title: Spot the sequential pattern
steps.content: The passage describes the ebru process using “First” and “Next”—marking a step-by-step progression. The blank must continue this temporal sequence to its final step.

steps.title: Complete the temporal progression
steps.content:
Finally marks the concluding action in the process being described.

The other three choices either indicate correction (Actually), causation (Therefore), or contrast (Nevertheless)—none of which fit a straightforward procedural description.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
